arts.ttl: Predicted Hull City line up for Doncaster Rovers with summer signing in line for his Tigers bow
arts.sum: City's predicted starting XI: Rushworth, Jacob, Smith, Jones, Drameh, Burns, Simons, Vaughan, Kamara, Burstow, Pedro. Rushworth, who joined City on the final day of the summer window from Brighton and Hove Albion, has not yet made an appearance after suffering a major injury setback in October which has kept him sidelined since, but the FA Cup presents him with an opportunity after coming through a clear week in training.

arts.ttl: Hull City interested in signing Brazilian playmaker after Jose Mourinho transfer decision
arts.sum: Multiple outlets in Turkey have suggested Tigers owner Acun Ilicali is working on a deal that will see the Fenerbahce player join the Championship club on loan until the end of the season. The former Middlesbrough man, who penned a two-year-deal, said: “I’m buzzing to finally get it done and excited to get started.

arts.ttl: FA Cup provides Hull City with a big chance they must not pass up
arts.sum: For the first time in his fledgling City career, Ruben Selles will take charge of a cup game and while naturally, staying in the Championship remains the big priority, having a run in the FA Cup is exactly what the club needs. On Sunday, City's 2025 incarnation will host League Two Doncaster Rovers, a team they're no stranger to, having played them in the Carabao Cup last season and again in the summer just gone - the less said about those two horror shows, the better I'd suggest.

arts.ttl: Grant McCann delivers Hull City verdict ahead of latest Tigers reunion
arts.sum: McCann, who guided City to the League One title in the 2020/21 campaign, will be looking to claim a second successive win when the pair meet in the FA Cup third round at high-noon on Sunday, having knocked the Tigers out of the Carabao Cup last season. McCann also explained the thinking around Brandon Fleming's season-long loan stint at the Eco-Power Stadium being cut short, with the defender set to be loaned out to another League Two club, Hull Live understands.

arts.ttl: Why Doncaster Rovers will have nothing to fear against Hull City in FA Cup
arts.sum: Rovers occupy the final play-off spot in League Two, but given the congested nature of the division, are just two points off the automatic promotion places, though their hopes were hit at home to Port Vale last weekend when they were beaten 2-1 by their rivals. We need to rectify the Port Vale result in that next game.

arts.ttl: ‘Only matter of time’ – Hull City closing in on signing January target
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Hull City should soon complete the transfer of Fenerbahce midfielder Lincoln. Yesterday there were reports the Championship side were looking to get a deal over the line for the 26-year-old. NTV Spor report on the latest developments regarding Hull City’s pursuit for the Brazilian, and they say The post ‘Only matter of time’ – Hull City closing in on signing January target appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Hull City star's FA Cup comments will be music to the ears of Tigers diehards
arts.sum: Abu Kamara wants to build on his man of the performance against Leeds United as Hull City prepare to face Doncaster Rovers in the FA Cup third round. The Tigers battled back from 3-1 down to draw 3-3 in a pulsating Yorkshire derby with the Whites, with Kamara scoring a brace with one coming after five minutes, and his second in the 90th to snatch a point.

arts.ttl: Hull City handed double boost for FA Cup clash with Grant McCann's Doncaster Rovers
arts.sum: It was really difficult before we arrived here, so we know how much it costs for that kind of game, and we need to be at our best if we want to go to the next round." Ryan Longman could return to the Hull City squad for Sunday’s FA Cup tie with Doncaster Rovers while, as expected, goalkeeper Carl Rushworth will be involved.

arts.ttl: Preview: Hull City vs. Doncaster Rovers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's FA Cup clash between Hull City and Doncaster Rovers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Dean Windass: Ex-Premier League star and Hull City legend diagnosed with dementia
arts.sum: Windass’ diagnosis was revealed by former Manchester United defender David May on BBC Breakfast
